name: bulk_extractor
summary: bulkextractor is a high-performance digital forensics exploitation tool. It is a "get evidence" button that rapidly scans any kind of input (disk images, files, directories of files, etc) and extracts structured information such as email addresses, credit card numbers, JPEGs and JSON snippets without parsing the file system or file system structures. The results are stored in text files that are easily inspected, searched, or used as inputs for other forensic processing. bulkextractor also creat

documentation.readme: bulkextractor is a high-performance digital forensics exploitation tool. It is a "get evidence" button that rapidly scans any kind of input (disk images, files, directories of files, etc) and extracts structured information such as email addresses, credit card numbers, JPEGs and JSON snippets without parsing the file system or file system structures. The results are stored in text files that are easily inspected, searched, or used as inputs for other forensic processing. bulkextractor also creates histograms of certain kinds of features that it finds, such as Google search terms and email addresses, as previous research has shown that such histograms are especially useful in investigative and law enforcement applications.
usage_sections: Apple Silicon macOS (local build and make distcheck, 2026-07-19)
Ubuntu 22.04 and current macOS GitHub Actions runners
Run -xall to run without any scanners.
Run with a random sampling of 0.001% to debug reading image size and a few quick seeks.
